race.comment: PRESTIGE MADDY (9) has gone around big prices in the two runs this time in but was a marked improver last time out when narrowly beaten by a horse who looks capable of racing through the grades. If she's taken any improvement from that she could be the testing material here. POLAR EYES (7) will be better for the debut run, when she raced handy and boxed on OK to be beaten less than 2 lengths. LOVE RUSTLER (5) is a newcomer to Victoria and has jumped out well for Taige Weir, who has made a great start to her training career. PRAGUE PRIDE (8) was unplaced on debut, but wasn't beaten far and was given a quiet time of things in the trial since. Any market warrants respect.
